race.comment: Open race with many chances. TEQUISODA (2) tackled 2000m for the first time last start and found a BM72 in Sydney Saturday metro company a bridge too far last start. Gets in with a similar weight today after the claim and will find this far easier. Ready to prove himself at this trip. MARSABIT (11) has forgotten how to win but bobs up occasionally. Backs up seven days after being outclassed in a BM78 at Rosehill. Will travel up near the speed and give backers a sight. The lightly raced FLYING GREY (3) made it two wins from three runs this prep when she drove hard late to get the cash over the mile at Wyong. Looks ready to take on this longer trip.
